description_long: This is a tall, lace-up boot with a robust and protective design, featuring a reinforced toe cap and a high shaft that extends well above the ankle. The exterior is primarily matte black with deep burgundy accents, including the tongue, collar, and pull tab at the back. The boot is constructed from what appears to be a combination of leather or synthetic leather and rubber, providing both durability and flexibility. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, running through metal eyelets up the front of the boot. The interior lining is visible at the top, suggesting a comfortable, padded fit. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where protection and support are needed.
description: A tall, black and burgundy lace-up boot with a reinforced toe and high shaft, designed for durability and protection. Features a criss-cross lacing system and padded interior for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the criss-cross lacing, reinforced toe cap, and padded tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall shaft, side stitching, and rear pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the pull tab, back seam, and interior lining.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the high shaft, side profile, and lacing system.
